features.name: Multi-Wallet & Transaction Consolidation Backend
acceptance_criteria: Modul Expense lama dihapus total dari route, model, dan view.
Skema DB PostgreSQL mendukung relasi User -> many Wallets -> many Transactions.
Setiap transaksi baru berhasil divalidasi kepemilikannya (wallet_id milik auth()->user()).
Setiap mutasi transaksi otomatis memperbarui nominal balance di tabel wallets menggunakan DB::transaction().

features.name: Web-First Analytics UI & Context Switcher
acceptance_criteria: Layout dashboard horizontal memanfaatkan lebar layar max-w-7xl tanpa sidebar (Breeze theme).
Tersedia dropdown selector wallet untuk memuat data ringkasan finansial (In, Out, Saldo) secara dinamis.
Form input manual (kiri) dan tabel riwayat (kanan) tampil berdampingan secara horizontal pada layar desktop.

features.name: Automated Security Test Integration
acceptance_criteria: Memiliki automated test PHPUnit untuk memverifikasi isolasi data wallet antar-user (mencegah data leakage).
Memiliki test untuk memastikan sistem menolak nominal transaksi bernilai 0 atau negatif.
features.evidence: tests/Feature/WalletSecurityTest.php - 9 tests covering wallet isolation and amount validation

features.name: Input UI Fixing
acceptance_criteria: Form input yang berhubungan dengan keuangan memiliki placeholder berawalan 'Rp' dan format currency IDR. (Perhatikan precision seperti 200000 ditulis Rp 200.000)
UI Dropdown Selector dan Modal (seperti peringatan hapus data) dirubah mengikuti dengan tema laravel breeze, tidak menggunakan bawaan browser.
Pewarnaan pada card wallet dibuat dengan kombinasi gradient warna yang lebih bervariasi, tidak monoton menggunakan warna biru dan ungu.
features.evidence: resources/js/app.js, resources/views/transactions/create.blade.php, transactions/edit.blade.php, transactions/index.blade.php, wallets/create.blade.php, wallets/edit.blade.php, wallets/index.blade.php - JavaScript IDR auto-formatting (Rp X.XXX), Rp placeholder, Breeze dropdowns/modals, varied wallet gradients

features.name: Dropdown Selector UI Fix
acceptance_criteria: Dropdown selector di seluruh aplikasi tidak menggunakan style bawaan browser, melainkan mengikuti tema laravel breeze. (seperti wallet-select.blade.php)
Dropdown selector harus responsif dan mudah digunakan di berbagai ukuran layar.
Wallet Select dropdown dapat memilih wallet yang berbeda dan memuat data ringkasan finansial (In, Out, Saldo) secara dinamis.
features.evidence: resources/views/components/select.blade.php - reusable Breeze-styled select component; resources/views/components/wallet-select.blade.php - Alpine.js custom dropdown for wallet switcher with hidden input for form submission; All native <select> elements replaced with x-select or x-wallet-select

features.name: Recurring Transactions
acceptance_criteria: User dapat membuat, mengedit, dan menghapus recurring transaction.
Recurring transaction mendukung frekuensi daily, weekly, monthly, yearly dengan JSON schedule_config.
Sistem memproses recurring transactions via artisan command yang dijadwalkan (ProcessRecurringTransactions).
Wallet balance diperbarui otomatis saat recurring transaction berhasil diproses.
Recurring transaction tidak tereksekusi jika di luar date range (start_date/end_date) atau is_active=false.
Policy memastikan user hanya bisa mengakses recurring transaction miliknya sendiri.

features.name: Dark Mode Toggle
acceptance_criteria: Dark mode toggle button available in navigation
Dark mode preference persisted in localStorage
All pages respect dark mode preference

features.name: SPA Conversion - Backend API Layer
acceptance_criteria: Laravel Sanctum installed for API authentication
HasApiTokens trait added to User model
API Controllers created (Wallet, Transaction, RecurringTransaction, Dashboard, Category)
API routes properly namespaced to avoid conflict with web routes
API Authentication endpoints (login, register, logout, me)
features.evidence: app/Models/User.php (HasApiTokens); app/Http/Controllers/Api/*.php (6 API controllers including AuthApiController); routes/api.php (Sanctum configured, api.* namespaced routes); app/Http/Requests/StoreWalletRequest.php; app/Http/Requests/UpdateWalletRequest.php

features.name: Vue 3 SPA Frontend
acceptance_criteria: Vue 3 SPA with Pinia state management and Vue Router
Auth pages: Login and Register with form validation
Dashboard page with wallet selector, 3-col summary cards, recent transactions
Wallets page with gradient cards, create/edit modal, delete confirmation modal
Transactions page with 3-col layout (form + summary + table), inline CRUD, delete modal
Blade template parity: no Alpine.js x-show, proper Vue transitions for modals
features.evidence: resources/js/spa/ - App.vue, router.js, stores/auth.js; pages/ - Login.vue (84 lines), Register.vue (115 lines), Dashboard.vue (131 lines), Wallets.vue (294 lines), Transactions.vue (446 lines)
